title: hieracium sparsum subsp. kotschyanum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. kotschyanum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium sparsum subsp. kotschyanum lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Hieracium sparsum subsp. kotschyanum is typically prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a herbal remedy.
